'''âl-t-b''' ('''kalatab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unball|unball]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-t-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unball|unball]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-t-b
|-
! Lemma
| kalatab
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilatab|thilatab]] || [[word:jilatab|jilatab]] || [[word:shilatab|shilatab]] || [[word:kilatab|kilatab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulatab|thuthulatab]] || [[word:jujulatab|jujulatab]] || [[word:shushulatab|shushulatab]] || [[word:kukulatab|kukulatab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thulatab|thulatab]] || [[word:julatab|julatab]] || [[word:shulatab|shulatab]] || [[word:kulatab|kulatab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thulatab|thulatab]] || [[word:julatab|julatab]] || [[word:shulatab|shulatab]] || [[word:kulatab|kulatab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thelatab|thelatab]] || [[word:jelatab|jelatab]] || [[word:shelatab|shelatab]] || [[word:kelatab|kelatab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotholatab|thotholatab]] || [[word:jojolatab|jojolatab]] || [[word:shosholatab|shosholatab]] || [[word:kokolatab|kokolatab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholatab|tholatab]] || [[word:jolatab|jolatab]] || [[word:sholatab|sholatab]] || [[word:kolatab|kolatab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholatab|tholatab]] || [[word:jolatab|jolatab]] || [[word:sholatab|sholatab]] || [[word:kolatab|kolatab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠlatab|thĂŠlatab]] || [[word:jĂŠlatab|jĂŠlatab]] || [[word:shĂŠlatab|shĂŠlatab]] || [[word:kĂŠlatab|kĂŠlatab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathalatab|thathalatab]] || [[word:jajalatab|jajalatab]] || [[word:shashalatab|shashalatab]] || [[word:kakalatab|kakalatab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalatab|thalatab]] || [[word:jalatab|jalatab]] || [[word:shalatab|shalatab]] || [[word:kalatab|kalatab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalatab|thalatab]] || [[word:jalatab|jalatab]] || [[word:shalatab|shalatab]] || [[word:kalatab|kalatab]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shalatab|shalatab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshalatab|goshalatab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishalatab|gokishalatab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shalatabnĂŒ|shalatabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshalatabnknĂŒ|goshalatabnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishalatabnĂŒ|gokishalatabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shalatabshĂ«|shalatabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshalatabnkshĂ«|goshalatabnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishalatabshĂ«|gokishalatabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalatabro|shalatabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalatabnkro|goshalatabnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalatabro|gokishalatabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shalatabmu|shalatabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalatabnkmu|goshalatabnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalatabmu|gokishalatabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shalatabsher|shalatabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshalatabnksher|goshalatabnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishalatabsher|gokishalatabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shalatabng|shalatabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshalatabnkng|goshalatabnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishalatabng|gokishalatabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shalatabya|shalatabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshalatabnkya|goshalatabnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishalatabya|gokishalatabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shalatabyam|shalatabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshalatabnkyam|goshalatabnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishalatabyam|gokishalatabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalatabnĂŒshĂ«|shalatabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalatabnknĂŒshĂ«|goshalatabnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalatabnĂŒshĂ«|gokishalatabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalatabnĂŒro|shalatabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalatabnknĂŒro|goshalatabnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalatabnĂŒro|gokishalatabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalatabnĂŒmu|shalatabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalatabnknĂŒmu|goshalatabnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalatabnĂŒmu|gokishalatabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalatabshĂ«nĂŒ|shalatabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalatabnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshalatabnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalatabshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishalatabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalatabshĂ«ro|shalatabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalatabnkshĂ«ro|goshalatabnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalatabshĂ«ro|gokishalatabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalatabshĂ«mu|shalatabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalatabnkshĂ«mu|goshalatabnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalatabshĂ«mu|gokishalatabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalatabronĂŒ|shalatabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalatabnkronĂŒ|goshalatabnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalatabronĂŒ|gokishalatabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalatabroshĂ«|shalatabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalatabnkroshĂ«|goshalatabnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalatabroshĂ«|gokishalatabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalatabromu|shalatabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalatabnkromu|goshalatabnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalatabromu|gokishalatabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalatabmunĂŒ|shalatabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalatabnkmunĂŒ|goshalatabnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalatabmunĂŒ|gokishalatabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalatabmushĂ«|shalatabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalatabnkmushĂ«|goshalatabnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalatabmushĂ«|gokishalatabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalatabmuro|shalatabmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalatabnkmuro|goshalatabnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalatabmuro|gokishalatabmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
